Crafted requests targeting Next.js applications using App Router with at least one Server Action can lead to excessive CPU usage blocking processing of further requests in the same process.

## Workarounds

No workaround exists besides upgrading. Applications using Pages Router or not using Server Actions are not vulnerable.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m99w-x7hq-7vfj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:59:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m99w-x7hq-7vfj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m99w-x7hq-7vfj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-64641"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:59:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vercel/next.js/security/advisories/GHSA-m99w-x7hq-7vfj", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/96013", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/commit/019628571641dec57aaf349ba0c360e3964e6f12", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/releases/tag/v15.5.21", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/releases/tag/v16.2.11", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m99w-x7hq-7vfj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/next.js/security-advisories/GHSA-m99w-x7hq-7vfj", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vercel/next.js", "summary": "Next.js: Denial of Service in App Router using Server Actions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:59:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m99w-x7hq-7vfj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "15.5.21", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 13.0.0, < 15.5.21"}, {"first_patched_version": "16.2.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 16.0.0, < 16.2.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Next.js: Denial of Service in App Router using Server Actions
